tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services for Relocation of QMT Refueling Station and QSB Switchgear - E-J Electric Installation Company $25,450,000

Includes removing existing refueling station and underground tanks from QSB garage on 51st Ave in Long Island City, installing new outdoor refueling station and EV charging stations at Borden Avenue lot, new site lighting, security cameras, perimeter fencing, and resilient electrical distribution room.

payload.statement: MTA has signed a legal agreement to maintain aggressive investment level in future Capital Programs until at least 95% of stations are outfitted with elevators or ramps.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA is taking the next great leap towards universal accessibility by signing a legal agreement that commits to maintaining an aggressive level of investment in future MTA Capital Programs until at least 95% of stations are outfitted with elevators or ramps.
